attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  AE_HEADER_ID                  
  ,AE_LINE_NUM                   
  ,APPLICATION_ID                
  ,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
  ,GL_SL_LINK_ID                 
  ,ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE         
  ,PARTY_ID                      
  ,PARTY_SITE_ID                 
  ,PARTY_TYPE_CODE               
  ,ENTERED_DR                    
  ,ENTERED_CR                    
  ,ACCOUNTED_DR                  
  ,ACCOUNTED_CR                  
  ,CURRENCY_CODE  
  ,CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE    
  ,CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE 
  ,CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE  
  ,ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            
  ,ATTRIBUTE1                    
  ,ATTRIBUTE2                    
  ,ATTRIBUTE3
  ,ATTRIBUTE4
  ,ATTRIBUTE5
  ,ATTRIBUTE6
  ,ATTRIBUTE7
  ,ATTRIBUTE8
  ,ATTRIBUTE9 
  ,ATTRIBUTE10
  ,ATTRIBUTE11        
  ,ATTRIBUTE12       
  ,ATTRIBUTE13        
  ,ATTRIBUTE14        
  ,ATTRIBUTE15     
  ,GL_SL_LINK_TABLE 
  ,CREATION_DATE 
  ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE   
  ,UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR        
  ,UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR        
  ,UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR          
  ,UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR          
  ,ACCOUNTING_DATE               
  ,LEDGER_ID                     
  ,SOURCE_TABLE                  
  ,SOURCE_ID    
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME  
  ,GLOBAL_NAME   
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME    
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER                     
  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XLA_AE_LINES_OA_S ST
  WHERE  NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_OA_S EL
  WHERE EL.AE_HEADER_ID= ST.AE_HEADER_ID                   
  AND EL.AE_LINE_NUM= ST.AE_LINE_NUM
  AND EL.APPLICATION_ID =ST.APPLICATION_ID )
